strengths: 20 years of diverse technical experience exceeding the 15-year requirement, with proven innovation across multiple platforms and domains
Demonstrated ability to inspire and teach through workshops, talks, open-source projects, and community-building efforts
Current engagement with AI infrastructure and agentic systems through MCP work and developer tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated track record of building AI products or platforms—the role explicitly seeks "recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI"
Limited evidence of strategic customer advisory or cloud product strategy experience; career shows hands-on engineering execution rather than strategic partnership work
No Master's/PhD in AI-related field, and AI expertise appears recent rather than established; lacks the "recognized expertise" the role emphasizes
response.justification: Bogdan brings strong technical depth and proven ability to inspire through teaching and building innovative platforms. However, the role requires demonstrated AI product/platform success and strategic customer advisory experience—areas where the candidate shows limited track record. Recent AI infrastructure work is promising but too early-stage and infrastructure-focused to meet the "recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products" requirement. The candidate reads as an exceptional technical builder and craftsman, but lacks the strategic product and customer-facing leadership background this director-level strategic role demands.
